extraction.one_line_summary: ROGLIC Primož won by 6 seconds over ARANBURU Alex with devastating final 300m at 35mph, BERNAL Egan lost 21 seconds.
tactical_patterns: ROGLIC Primož conserved energy on 2.5km climb, gained entire margin in final 300m at 35mph, reverse-pacing strategy successful.
ARANBURU Alex from sprinter squad beat pure climbers on uphill TT, took 5 seconds from YATES Adam on descent/flat finish.
BERNAL Egan unexpectedly slow on climb (17s down on ARANBURU), suggesting form concerns rather than pacing strategy for GC leader.

rider_signals.ROGLIC Primož: positive: reversed typical TT pacing by saving watts for final 300m, suggesting superior power reserve management for short efforts
rider_signals.ARANBURU Alex: positive: sprinter beat climbing specialists YATES Adam and BERNAL Egan on technical hilly 7km TT, underestimated all-rounder
rider_signals.BERNAL Egan: negative: lost 21 seconds (3s/km) and surprisingly slow on climb itself, team will question protected rider status
rider_signals.CRADDOCK Lawson: positive: 8th place only 0.5s behind at KOM, EF rider showed unexpectedly strong climbing form for American domestique
rider_signals.TROTNIC Jan: positive: Slovenian TT champion 2nd fastest, only 2s behind ARANBURU, Bahrain has second GC card if needed
